channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [模型算法] PARE: Pruning and Adaptive Routing for Efficient Video Generation
item.description:
📊 Score: 153 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • L2-Tech:pruning(+25)
  • L3-Tech:transformer(+15)
  • L3-Tech:diffusion(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Video Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) generate high-quality videos but demand substantial compute due to wide blocks, deep architectures, and iterative sampling. Recent methods reduce cost by compressing width, depth, or sampling steps, but typically commit to a fixed architecture that cannot adapt to individual inputs or denoising stages. We propose...

item.title: [2] [模型算法] MobileMoE: Scaling On-Device Mixture of Experts
item.description:
📊 Score: 145 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: HF Papers | Domain: huggingface.co

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:HF Papers(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:huggingface.co(+50)
  • L1-Tech:on-device(+40)
  • L3-Tech:moe(+15)
  • L3-Tech:mixture of experts(+15)

item.title: [3] [模型算法] MobileMoE: Scaling On-Device Mixture of Experts
item.description:
📊 Score: 130 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:on-device(+40)
  • L3-Tech:moe(+15)
  • L3-Tech:mixture of experts(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) has become the de facto architecture for hundred-billion-parameter language models, yet its advantages at sub-billion scales for on-device deployment remain largely unexplored. To close this gap, we present MobileMoE, a family of on-device MoE language models with sub-billion active parameters (0.3-0.9B active and 1.3-5.3B ...

item.title: [4] [模型算法] Gemini Embedding 2: A Native Multimodal Embedding Model from Gemini
item.description:
📊 Score: 117 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • L3-Tech:rag(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: We introduce Gemini Embedding 2, a native multimodal embedding model that allows embedding video, audio, image, and text modalities in a unified representation space. We leverage the multimodal capabilities of Gemini to produce embeddings for arbitrary combinations of interleaved inputs across all these modalities that generalize well across a wide...

item.title: [9] [模型算法] SpatialBench: Is Your Spatial Foundation Model an All-Round Player?
item.description:
📊 Score: 103 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: While spatial foundation models have demonstrated impressive performance on standard datasets, a critical question remains: are they truly all-round players capable of generalizing robustly across diverse downstream tasks, arbitrary viewpoints, shifting scene domains, varying input densities, and specific hardware constraints? Answering this overar...

item.title: [10] [行业动态] Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans
item.description:
📊 Score: 100 | Category: 行业动态

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release

📄 Summary: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One” subscription brand....
